ordo.label: Ordo

options.label: Ordo Hereticus
options.bonus: +2 bonus dice to resist psychic powers, OR +2 bonus dice to Corruption Tests

options.label: Ordo Xenos
options.bonus: Fluent in one alien language; +2 bonus dice on Scholar/Investigation Tests related to xenos

options.label: Ordo Malleus
options.bonus: +3 Corruption and +1 Conviction, OR +2 bonus dice on Scholar/Investigation Tests related to daemons and the Warp

ordo.customBonus: +Rank bonus dice to Tests with one chosen Skill

options.label: Armageddon Steel Legion
options.bonus: +Rank bonus dice to repair vehicle/weapon Tests

options.label: Gilead Gravediggers
options.bonus: +Rank bonus to Defence when in Cover

options.label: Iron Hands
options.bonus: The Flesh Is Weak + Ruthless Logic

apocryphaBonus.effect:
Righteous Zeal: When you charge, you may re-roll up to Rank dice on your Weapon Skill test. In addition, you may re-roll Rank dice when you roll Determination.
Gene-Seed Flaw: You are missing implant 12: Sus-an Membrane, and implant 17: Betcher's Gland.
Characters with the BLACK TEMPLARS keyword may not, under any circumstances, take the PSYKER keyword: The Black Templars accept no psykers within their ranks.

No Matter the Odds: When making an attack while you and your allies are outnumbered at least two-to-one, you may add Rank dice to your Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill test.
Gene-Seed Flaw: You are missing implant 12: Sus-an Membrane, and implant 17: Betcher's Gland.

Fury Within: You may re-roll Double Rank dice once per melee attack Test. In addition, if you shift one or more Icons on a melee attack, improve the AP of your attack by 1 (i.e., from -1 to -2).
The Red Thirst: Whenever you are in melee combat and see blood, you must make a DN 4 Willpower Test. If you fail, you are Frenzied.

Daemonbane: When attacking a creature with the DAEMON keyword in melee combat, you add +Rank ED to the attack's damage. You also add +Rank to your Conviction.
Secretive: You suffer a +2DN penalty for Interaction tests involving anyone who lacks the Grey Knights or Inquisition keywords.
Due to their unique geneseed and secretive nature, the Grey Knights do not yet count any Primaris Marines amongst their number. As such, Primaris Astartes characters cannot select this CHAPTER.

options.label: Bad Moons
options.bonus: +1 Wealth at end of every session

options.label: Blood Axes
options.bonus: +Rank bonus dice to Leadership (Wil) and Stealth (A) Tests

options.label: Deathskulls
options.bonus: +Rank bonus dice to Tech (Int) and Influence Tests

options.label: Evil Sunz
options.bonus: +1 Speed; +Rank bonus dice in vehicles at top speed

options.label: Goffs
options.bonus: +Rank bonus dice to melee attack Tests when you Charge

options.label: Snakebites
options.bonus: +Double Rank bonus dice to Survival (Wil) Tests

apocryphaBonus.name: The Blood of Martyrs
apocryphaBonus.effect: You regain all spent Faith points when you start Dying. You regain 1 Faith point whenever an ally is slain or starts Dying.

apocryphaBonus.name: Deeds, Not Words
apocryphaBonus.effect: When you make an attack, you may re-roll up to Rank dice on that attack.

apocryphaBonus.name: Quick to Anger
apocryphaBonus.effect: Add +Rank bonus dice to your melee attacks when you Charge.

apocryphaBonus.name: Daughter of the Emperor
apocryphaBonus.effect: When you roll Determination, you may spend 1 Faith. If you do so, negate all damage the attack would cause, including Mortal Wounds, but do not suffer any Shock.

apocryphaBonus.name: Devout Serenity
apocryphaBonus.effect: You increase your Resolve by +Rank. Further, if you ever roll a 6 on your Wrath die when making a Resolve test, you gain 1 Faith.

apocryphaBonus.name: Stoic Endurance
apocryphaBonus.effect: You add +Rank bonus dice to Determination rolls.

apocryphaBonus.name: Voice of the Church
apocryphaBonus.effect: You gain +Rank bonus dice on all Persuasion tests.

apocryphaBonus.name: Pious Scrutiny
apocryphaBonus.effect: Your Passive Awareness is increased by +Rank.

apocryphaBonus.name: Voice of Judgement
apocryphaBonus.effect: When you attempt a Persuasion interaction attack, you may spend 1 Faith Point to target +Rank enemies.

apocryphaBonus.name: Unquestioned Faith
apocryphaBonus.effect: You increase your Conviction by +Rank.

apocryphaBonus.name: Key to Power
apocryphaBonus.effect: You increase your Influence by +1.

apocryphaBonus.name: Watchful Counselor
apocryphaBonus.effect: When you attempt an Awareness, Insight, Leadership, Scholar, or Persuasion test, each point of Glory you spend adds +2 dice.

apocryphaBonus.name: Inescapable Scrutiny
apocryphaBonus.effect: When you succeed at an Insight test, you may spend 1 Faith point to discern some inner truth or secret shame of the target. Ask the GM one question about the target.

apocryphaBonus.name: Faith and Coin
apocryphaBonus.effect: When you attempt an Influence test to requisition items, you may spend 2 Glory to gain the effects of 1 Wealth.

apocryphaBonus.name: Healing Light
apocryphaBonus.effect: When you succeed at a Medicae test to heal wounds or stabilise a dying character, or when you heal Wounds during a Regroup, you may spend 1 Faith to heal an additional +Double Rank Wounds.

apocryphaBonus.name: Serene Endurance
apocryphaBonus.effect: When you succeed at a Medicae test to recover a patient's Shock, recover +Rank shock. Your own Maximum Shock is increased by +Rank.

apocryphaBonus.name: Indomitable Purity
apocryphaBonus.effect: Allies with the IMPERIUM keyword within 6m of you reduce the rating of any Poisoned condition, or the DN of any test to resist disease, by 1+ double your Rank. If this would reduce the rating or DN to 0, then the poison or disease has no effect.

apocryphaBonus.name: Purifying Flame
apocryphaBonus.effect: When you attempt a Medicae test to remove a condition, you gain +Rank bonus dice on the test.

apocryphaBonus.name: Puritanical Discipline
apocryphaBonus.effect: Your Conviction is increased by +Rank.

apocryphaBonus.name: Prowess of the Bladewind
apocryphaBonus.effect: Select either ranged attacks or melee attacks. You may re-roll up to Rank dice on the chosen type of attack.

apocryphaBonus.name: Stoic and Tenacious
apocryphaBonus.effect: Your Resolve is increased by +Rank.

apocryphaBonus.name: Foresight of the Damned
apocryphaBonus.effect: You increase your Passive Perception by +Rank.

apocryphaBonus.name: Grim Survivors
apocryphaBonus.effect: Your Determination is increased by +Rank.

apocryphaBonus.name: Fury of the Wild Hunt
apocryphaBonus.effect: You increase your Speed by +Rank when you Sprint or Charge, or when mounted on an AELDARI vehicle with the Hover trait.

apocryphaBonus.name: Glory to the Omnissiah
apocryphaBonus.effect: You may shift up to two dice to Glory on a single Test, rather than one.

apocryphaBonus.name: Red in Cog and Claw
apocryphaBonus.effect: You may re-roll up to Rank dice when making a melee attack.

apocryphaBonus.name: Relentless March
apocryphaBonus.effect: When you Sprint, you may fire a ranged weapon as if it had the Assault trait. You may not fire a Heavy weapon in this way.

apocryphaBonus.name: Staunch Defenders
apocryphaBonus.effect: When you are in cover and did not move during your turn, you add +Rank bonus dice to your ranged attacks.

apocryphaBonus.name: Refusal to Yield
apocryphaBonus.effect: When you make a Test while Dying, you heal 1 Wound for each Wrath Critical you roll. When you make a Test while under the effects of Fear, Terror or Pinning, a Wrath Critical causes you to recover from that condition immediately. However, you must spend a point of Glory to Fall Back.

apocryphaBonus.name: The Solar Blessing
apocryphaBonus.effect: When attacked by a weapon with only 1 ED, gain +1 Resilience.

apocryphaBonus.name: Shroud Protocols
apocryphaBonus.effect: You add +Rank bonus dice to Stealth Tests and gain an additional +1 to Defence against ranged attacks from more than 12 metres away.

The Tip of the Spear: You may re-roll Rank dice on all Ballistic Skill tests made with a ranged weapon at close range. You may also re-roll Rank dice on Weapon Skill tests made when you Charge. You also gain +1 Resolve.
Bitter Pride: You suffer a +2DN penalty for Interaction tests involving anyone outside the Black Legion, unless those people are subordinate to the Black Legion character.

Inexorable Advance: You suffer no penalty for operating a Heavy weapon without bracing it, and when you take a normal move, you may use your Simple Action to aim.
Intractable: You must spend a point of Glory to take the Sprint action.
Characters with the DEATH GUARD keyword must take NURGLE as their [MARK OF CHAOS] keyword.

Profane Zeal: When you charge, you may re-roll up to Rank dice on your Weapon Skill test. In addition, you may re-roll Rank dice when you roll Determination. In addition, you are immune to fear caused by creatures with the DAEMON keyword.
The Will of the Gods: You start each session with 1 Wrath Point instead of 2.

In Pursuit of Perfection: Select one of the following skills: Awareness, Ballistic Skill, Leadership, Pilot, Weapon Skill. You gain +Rank dice as a bonus to all uses of that skill.
Fear of Imperfection: Whenever you suffer a complication on the skill chosen for Pursuit of Perfection, above, the GM gains 1 Ruin, in addition to any other results.
Characters with the EMPEROR'S CHILDREN keyword must take SLAANESH as their [MARK OF CHAOS] keyword.

Siege Masters: You may reroll Double Rank dice whenever you attack a building, fortification, or an enemy in cover. You may also add +Rank dice whenever you make a test related to architectural engineering.
Scorn for the Weak: If one of your allies fails a Resolve test, you must pass a Willpower test (DN 3). On a failure, you feel a strong urge to punish that ally. If the failure involves a complication, the urge becomes a compulsion. The GM may alter the DN based on the severity or significance of the failure.

Ave Dominus Nox: While under cover of darkness, you may add +Rank to your Defence and Speed. As a free action at the start of combat, you may spend one Glory to cause Fear for the duration of the fight; enemies who see you must pass a Fear test (DN 2 + Double Rank).
Blood of Nostramo: If you see an ally fail a Resolve or Fear test, you must attempt a Resolve test (DN 3) or become pinned.

Incarnate Violence: You may reroll Double Rank dice on any melee attack test.
Butcher's Nails: Upon engaging in melee combat, you become Frenzied for the rest of the battle. The Willpower test to restrain your frenzy increases by +1 for every enemy you have killed during the battle.
Characters with the WORLD EATERS keyword must take KHORNE as their [MARK OF CHAOS] keyword.

The Rubric: You gain the Favoured by The Warp talent.
Gift of Mutation: You gain an additional +1 Corruption whenever you would gain one or more Corruption points. You also increase the DN of all tests to resist Corruption or Malignancy by +1.
Characters with the THOUSAND SONS keyword must take TZEENTCH as their [MARK OF CHAOS] keyword.

Mutable Tactics: After each Respite, select one of the following skills: Athletics, Cunning, Deception, Intimidation, Persuasion, Stealth, or Tech. You may re-roll up to Rank dice on any test involving the chosen skill.
I Am Alpharius: Add 1 to Ruin when you fail an Intellect test, as your carefully wrought plans and contingencies fail you.

apocryphaBonus.name: Exemplar
apocryphaBonus.effect: You increase your Influence, Resolve, and Conviction each by +1.

apocryphaBonus.name: Warden
apocryphaBonus.effect: When an enemy engaged with you attempts to Fall Back, roll a number of d6 equal to Double Rank. For each Icon rolled, the enemy's Speed is reduced by 1.

apocryphaBonus.name: Wrath of the Throne
apocryphaBonus.effect: At the start of the first round of combat, or when you enter combat, enemies who can see you who lack the IMPERIUM keyword must pass a DN 2 +Rank Fear test.

apocryphaBonus.name: Guardian
apocryphaBonus.effect: At the start of the first round of combat, or when you enter combat, you may select a single ally with the IMPERIUM keyword. While that ally is within 3 metres of you, they add +Rank to their Defence.

apocryphaBonus.name: Swift Onslaught
apocryphaBonus.effect: When you Run, Sprint, or Charge, you increase your Speed by +1. Further, you may Fall Back as a Simple Action rather than a Combat Action.

apocryphaBonus.name: Herald of the Throne
apocryphaBonus.effect: Allies within 9m who possess the IMPERIUM keyword increase their Resolve and Conviction by +Rank.

apocryphaBonus.name: Dark Deeds
apocryphaBonus.effect: When the character makes a melee attack, improve the AP of that attack by 1.

apocryphaBonus.name: Blaze of Light
apocryphaBonus.effect: When the character is the target of a ranged attack and their attacker is 12 of more metres away, add +1 to the character's Defence.

apocryphaBonus.name: Twilight Falls
apocryphaBonus.effect: When the character uses the Charge action, they gain +1 bonus dice when making their attack.
They grant +Rank dice to Pilot tests and Conviction.
They add +Rank to their Influence and Wealth.
They add +Rank to Cunning and Stealth tests.
They begin with 1d3x Tier Corruption but add +Rank to Psychic Mastery tests and Maximum Shock.
Increase the character's Resolve and Determination by +Rank.
The character adds +Rank dice to Stealth tests and adds +Rank ED to any damage rolls with Fleshbane weapons.
The character adds +Rank to all ranged attacks or melee attacks made when they are above their target.

The short range of any ranged weapon the character possesses is increased by +Rank, the medium range is increased by +Double Rank, and the long range is increased by three times Rank. In addition, the character may re-roll up to Rank ED when determining damage with one of their own weapons.
The character may Seize the Initiative without spending Glory. They may do this a number of times per scene equal to Rank.
When the character rolls Determination against damage inflicted in melee, each Exalted Icon rolled inflicts a single Mortal Wound upon the attacker.
The character's Speed is increased by +Rank when they Advance or Charge.
The character adds +Rank to their Determination, and each Exalted Icon rolled when rolling Determination restores a single lost Wound after the attack is resolved.
Enemies within 6m add +2 DN to all Resolve tests. In addition, the character adds +Rank dice to all attacks against enemies with a lower Resolve than them.
When making a melee attack, the character improves the AP of their weapon by 1 (i.e., from -1 to -2). In addition, the character reduces the total penalty of any Multi-Action they attempt by Rank.

apocryphaBonus.name: Highly Efficient
apocryphaBonus.effect: You add +1 to your Influence, and you gain +1 Wealth at the end of each session.

apocryphaBonus.name: Elite Artisans
apocryphaBonus.effect: You add +Rank to Tech skill tests and add +1 to the AR of any armour you wear.

apocryphaBonus.name: To the Last
apocryphaBonus.effect: You add +Rank to your Resolve, and you add +1 to your Determination.

apocryphaBonus.name: Nomadic Explorers
apocryphaBonus.effect: You increase your Passive Awareness by +Rank and add +1d to all Pilot skill tests.

apocryphaBonus.name: Aggressive Expansion
apocryphaBonus.effect: You may re-roll Rank dice on melee attacks when you charge and add +1ED to the damage of all melee attacks when you charge.

Air Caste: Add +1 to the Speed, Wounds, and Resilience of their vehicles, due to superior engineering.
Earth Caste: Add +2 to their Medicae, Scholar, and Tech skills.
Fire Caste: Add +2 to the short range of their ranged weapons, +4 to the medium range, and +6 to the long range.
Water Caste: May re-roll a 1 on their Wrath die when attempting a Cunning, Deception, Insight, or Persuasion test.

Air Caste: Add +2 to the Defence of their vehicles when they perform Evasive Action.
Earth Caste: Carry devices which are cunningly wrought with hidden functions or secret countermeasures: double the range of the character's Tech interaction attacks.
Fire Caste: Employ advanced camouflage systems to obscure their presence; if they do not move during their turn, they add +2 to their Defence (as if in cover) until the start of their next turn.
Water Caste: Add +2 to their Cunning, Deception, Insight, and Persuasion skills.

All Caste: T'au from the Farsight Enclaves are rebels, free from the dogma and deceptions of the Ethereals, and add +2 to their Conviction.
Fire Caste: Drilled to engage enemies at close range: they add an extra +2 to all attacks made against enemies within 9m.

All Caste: Add +1 to their Resolve.
Air Caste: Hone their skills in the skies above dense cityscapes, where absolute precision is needed: they may re-roll any 1s rolled (even on a Wrath die) for Pilot tests.
Earth Caste: Keenly observant, almost to a point of wariness, and add +2d to all Awareness tests.
Fire Caste: Have exceptional fire discipline: they may re-roll one die on any Ballistic Skill test they attempt.
All Caste: T'au from the T'au Sept grant +1 additional die when they assist an ally. Further, whenever they use an ability which affects T'AU EMPIRE allies, the range is increased by +3m.

Air Caste: Have a knack for high-speed manoeuvres that other T'au might balk at: they ignore the additional Wrath Dice that comes piloting a vehicle at Breakneck speed.
Earth Caste: Quick to experiment and jury-rig the devices they use: they may add a second Wrath die to any Tech test they attempt, and thus have the potential for two criticals, two complications, or one of each.
Fire Caste: Advance and redeploy quickly, adding +1 to their Speed during the first round of each combat, and +1 Speed when they Run or Sprint.
Water Caste: Fast-talking and effusive: they may add a second Wrath die to any Persuasion test they attempt, and thus have the potential for two criticals, two complications, or one of each.
